name: docs-drift-check
description: Spot likely documentation drift in a branch, pull request, or local diff.

interface.longDescription: Scans code changes for doc-sensitive signals like env vars, CLI flags, routes, config keys, and renames, then points to likely stale docs files.
defaultPrompt: Check whether this branch likely needs documentation updates.
Review this PR for README, docs, and setup drift.
Find stale docs caused by recent API or config changes.
